channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Knicks Hold 1-0 Series Lead Over Spurs Going into Game 2
item.description: The New York Knicks visit the San Antonio Spurs in the NBA Finals with a 1-0 series lead

item.title: Flesh-eating screwworm found in Texas for first time in decades
item.description: The USDA reports the New World screwworm fly has been detected in South Texas, a first in decades.

item.title: U.S. destroys suspected drug boat in Pacific, killing two more
item.description: At least 207 people have died since the Trump administration started targeting alleged narcoterrorists in September.

item.title: SPLC seeks sanctions against DOJ over unsigned indictment copy
item.description: The Southern Poverty Law Center has asked a judge to consider sanctioning federal prosecutors for sharing an unsigned indictment copy.
